languages.text: "Моим ржаволовчим удалось достать из затопленных ангаров рабочий шаттл. Как только ксеноересь будет уничтожена, мы покинем этот рассадник скверны, доберемся до орбитальной техстанции и отправим сообщениее на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17. Станочную прислугу станции уже не спасти — все то, что соприкоснулось с техноересью однажды, навсегда запятнано ей. Мы не можем так рисковать".

"My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."
languages.original_text: "Моим ржаволовчим удалось достать из затопленных ангаров рабочий шаттл. Как только ксеноересь будет уничтожена, мы покинем этот рассадник скверны, доберемся до орбитальной техстанции и отправим сообщениее на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17. Станочную прислугу станции уже не спасти — все то, что соприкоснулось с техноересью однажды, навсегда запятнано ей. Мы не можем так рисковать".

As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."

"My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption and carry a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The rest cannot be saved — whatever is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it."

"My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption and carry a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The rest cannot be saved — whatever is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it."

languages.text: 「私のラスターカーは、洪水で浸水した格納庫から稼働可能なシャトルを回収することに成功しました。異教の汚染が除去されれば、この腐敗の温床を離れ、アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17にメッセージを届けます。残りは救えません。テクノロジーの異教に触れたものは、永遠にその汚染を受け継ぎます」
languages.original_text: "My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption and carry a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The rest cannot be saved — whatever is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it."

traits.locale_text: 「私のラスターカーは、洪水で浸水した格納庫から稼働可能なシャトルを回収することに成功しました。異教の汚染が除去されれば、この腐敗の温床を離れ、アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17にメッセージを届けます。残りは救えません。テクノロジーの異教に触れたものは、永遠にその汚染を受け継ぎます。」

languages.text: «Mis ferracechadores lograron recuperar una lanzadera operativa de los hangares inundados. Una vez la xenoherejía sea purgada, saldremos de este antro de corrupción, acudiremos a una tecnoestación orbital y transmitiremos un mensaje a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Los acompañantes mecánicos de la estación no pueden salvarse. Lo que la tecnoherejía toca queda mancillado eternamente. No podemos correr riesgos».
languages.original_text: "My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."

traits.locale_text: «Mis ferracechadores lograron recuperar una lanzadera operativa de los hangares inundados. Una vez la xenoherejía sea purgada, saldremos de este antro de corrupción, acudiremos a una tecnoestación orbital y transmitiremos un mensaje a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Los acompañantes mecánicos de la estación no pueden salvarse. Lo que la tecnoherejía toca queda mancillado eternamente. No podemos correr riesgos».

languages.text: “我的锈色追踪者从被淹的机库里找回了一架尚能运作的穿梭机。一旦完成异形造物的清除工作，我们就离开这个腐蚀温床，前往轨道技术站，向卡利西斯祭坛17号传递信息。该星站的机械侍仆已无法拯救——凡被技术异端触及者，便永遭玷污。我们担不起这样的风险。”
languages.original_text: "My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."

traits.locale_text: “我的锈色追踪者从被淹的机库里找回了一架尚能运作的穿梭机。一旦完成异形造物的清除工作，我们就离开这个腐蚀温床，前往轨道技术站，向卡利西斯祭坛17号传递信息。该星站的机械侍仆已无法拯救——凡被技术异端触及者，便永遭玷污。我们担不起这样的风险。”

languages.text: "Meine Rostpirscher konnten ein flugfähiges Shuttle aus den überfluteten Hangars bergen. Sobald die Xeno-Ketzerei eliminiert ist, werden wir diese Brutstätte der Korruption verlassen, Kurs auf eine orbitale Techstation nehmen und Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 eine Nachricht senden. Das Maschinenpersonal der Station kann nicht gerettet werden ... was von Tech-Ketzerei berührt wird, ist für immer davon befleckt. Ein solchen Risiko können wir nicht eingehen."
languages.original_text: "My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Rostpirscher konnten ein flugfähiges Shuttle aus den überfluteten Hangars bergen. Sobald die Xeno-Ketzerei eliminiert ist, werden wir diese Brutstätte der Korruption verlassen, Kurs auf eine orbitale Techstation nehmen und Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 eine Nachricht senden. Das Maschinenpersonal der Station kann nicht gerettet werden ... was von Tech-Ketzerei berührt wird, ist für immer davon befleckt. Ein solchen Risiko können wir nicht eingehen."

languages.text: "Pasavcısı grubum, su basmış hangarlardan çalışır durumda bir mekik çıkarmayı başardı. Zeno kâfirliği ortadan kaldırılır kaldırılmaz bu yozlaşma yuvasını terk edecek, yörüngedeki tekno istasyona gidecek ve Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye bir mesaj ileteceğiz. İstasyonun makine hizmetkârları kurtarılamaz. Tekno kâfirliğin dokunduğu her şey, sonsuza dek onunla lekelenir. Böyle bir riski göze alamayız."
languages.original_text: "My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."

traits.locale_text: "Pasavcısı grubum, su basmış hangarlardan çalışır durumda bir mekik çıkarmayı başardı. Zeno kâfirliği ortadan kaldırılır kaldırılmaz bu yozlaşma yuvasını terk edecek, yörüngedeki tekno istasyona gidecek ve Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye bir mesaj ileteceğiz. İstasyonun makine hizmetkârları kurtarılamaz. Tekno kâfirliğin dokunduğu her şey, sonsuza dek onunla lekelenir. Böyle bir riski göze alamayız."

languages.text: « Mes corrôdeurs ont trouvé une navette opérationnelle dans les hangars inondés. Dès que la xénohérésie sera éliminée, nous quitterons ce foyer de corruption, nous nous rendrons sur une technostation orbitale et nous enverrons un message à Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Les assistants mécaniques de la station ne peuvent être sauvés ; tout ce qui est touché par la technohérésie est à jamais souillé. Nous ne pouvons pas nous permettre de prendre un tel risque. »
languages.original_text: "My Ruststalkers managed to retrieve an operational shuttle from the flooded hangars. As soon as the xenoheresy is eliminated, we will leave this breeding ground of corruption, make our way to an orbital tech-station, and dispatch a message to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The station's machine attendants cannot be saved — all that is touched by tech-heresy is forever tainted by it. We cannot afford such a risk."
